creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
I think we really need to see output from a GENERIC-DEBUG kernel.  All the crash reports I see are from 14.1-RELEASE GENERIC, which is a non-debug kernel.

If you copy sys/amd64/conf/GENERIC-DEBUG and sys/conf/std.debug from a 14.2 tree into your 14.1 tree, you should be able to build a debug kernel with the usual "make buildkernel KERNCONF=GENERIC-DEBUG".
